reviews.review_msg: He is a nice professor with the extremely hard course, straight-forward notes, fair exams, easy to get assignment grades.

I had him for 302 as well and both times his class was VERY straightforward to do well in.  Exams are essentially pure application of the logic taught in class (or in the text).  Goes over examples very slowly and clearly, I have no idea how the averages are always fairly low.  Finished with an A+ in this class and in 302; very much do-able.

His explanations require you to review his notes before you attend the class. He works through conceptual questions in-class that are crucial in preparing for exams. Assignments are a easy 20%. Midterm was around 60%. Would take another micro theory class w/ this prof!
Although it's a tough course, he is really nice prof:)

Exams were difficult but the other students were practically braindead - curved A+ is really easy imo. His explanation of the topics is excellent -he goes REALLY slow over everything so you should be able to understand.  All that's needed is to do the homework and practice exams (I didn't study beyond this) and this course becomes really easy.

Took auction theory with him. Lecture is mandatory since participation mark is obtained from playing "moblab" during class. No trick questions on exams. Just study the lecture notes and you will ace it. Pretty sure many people got 100% on final(it was that easy)

Too easy at first and because of the bad partial marks given, i was failing until the final and then got a b-. lectures are terribly boring all you need are his explinations. very clean and precise notes some of the best. however do the exams over and over and meet with ta s if needed or go to him.
I consider Songzi to be a very good teacher for 302. Course is hard, so have to work hard for a good grade. Songzi is fair and all the lecture notes quizzes and tests are posted.

Songzi uses Shi-En Lu's lecture notes and does a decent job of walking the class through the material.  Don't skip class ever: you need his explanation to understand what's going on.  He's a genius, so sometimes he  loses the audience and the students are learning the material themselves at home.  Good thing he posts past exams with full solutions!
He is nice person but not a very good teacher. His lesson is not really helpful and his class is a little confusing. I studied this course by reading textbook and attending tutorials.
